title: C4 — claude-provider beta-fingerprint realign
scope: Components touched by the assembleBetas refactor inside @opencode-ai/claude-provider, plus the upstream reference and the test surface.

systems.name: opencode runtime
systems.description: The opencode CLI/daemon that issues Anthropic API requests through @opencode-ai/claude-provider.

systems.name: Anthropic API
systems.description: api.anthropic.com — the wire-fingerprint target. Behavior is what we are mimicking.

containers.name: @opencode-ai/claude-provider
containers.description: The wire-fingerprint mimicry layer. TypeScript package, no native deps. Invoked by opencode core via LanguageModelV2 interface.

containers.name: opencode core
containers.description: Caller that holds account state, session config, and constructs LMv2 prompts.

containers.name: refs/claude-code-npm
containers.description: Read-only mirror of @anthropic-ai/claude-code@2.1.112. Source-of-truth for upstream constants and assembler logic. Never executed.

components.name: protocol.ts :: assembleBetas
components.description: The function being rewritten. After realign, mirrors upstream ZR1's per-flag conditional push ladder.

components.name: protocol.ts :: model predicate helpers
components.description: isHaikuModel, supports1MContext, supportsThinking, modelSupportsContextManagement. Each carries an `// upstream:` comment.

components.name: headers.ts :: buildHeaders
components.description: Caller of assembleBetas; passes through the new option fields from BuildHeadersOptions.

components.name: provider.ts :: ClaudeCodeLanguageModel.doStream
components.description: Resolves env conditions, sets provider='firstParty', and forwards into buildHeaders.

components.name: test/protocol.test.ts
components.description: NEW. Matrix unit tests reading test-vectors.json fixture; asserts byte-equivalent output for each scenario.

components.name: cli.js :: ZR1 (upstream truth)
components.description: Minified upstream beta assembler. Read-only reference; offsets ~3482150 (function), ~2439173 (constants).

relationships.description: Calls LanguageModelV2.doStream() with prompt + provider options
Invokes buildHeaders with resolved env/provider options
Invokes assembleBetas with the resolved AssembleBetasOptions
Calls model predicate helpers to gate pushes
Asserts byte-equivalent output by feeding scenario inputs from test-vectors.json
Behavioral equivalence target. Verified manually + by matrix tests.
POST /v1/messages?beta=true with anthropic-beta header populated by assembleBetas output
